----Next_Part(Thu_Sep_15_18_33_31_2011_097)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

From: Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru>
Subject: Re: ports/160730: [UPDATE] x11-wm/xfce4 update pkg-descr
Date: Wed, 14 Sep 2011 22:33:59 +0400

> Ryusuke SUZUKI wrote on 14.09.2011 15:53:
> >> Number:         160730
> >> Category:       ports
> >> Synopsis:       [UPDATE] x11-wm/xfce4 update pkg-descr
> >> Confidential:   no
> >> Severity:       non-critical
> >> Priority:       low
> >> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >> State:          open
> >> Quarter:
> >> Keywords:
> >> Date-Required:
> >> Class:          update
> >> Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >> Arrival-Date:   Wed Sep 14 12:00:24 UTC 2011
> >> Closed-Date:
> >> Last-Modified:
> >> Originator:     Ryusuke SUZUKI
> >> Release:        8.2-STABLE
> >> Organization:
> >> Environment:
> >> Description:
> > The name of Xfce is capitalized as "Xfce", not as "XFce".
> >> How-To-Repeat:
> >
> >> Fix:
> > See patch.
> >
> >> Release-Note:
> >> Audit-Trail:
> >> Unformatted:
> > _______________________________________________
>
> Hi, Ryusuke.
> Looks like you forgot to attach the patch.

I am sorry...

I attached the patch. Please find it.

Ryusuke

----Next_Part(Thu_Sep_15_18_33_31_2011_097)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline; filename="xfce4.diff"

diff -ud xfce4.orig/Makefile xfce4/Makefile
--- xfce4.orig/Makefile	2011-09-15 18:28:32.000000000 +0900
+++ xfce4/Makefile	2011-09-15 18:28:23.000000000 +0900
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 EXTRACT_ONLY=	# empty

 MAINTAINER=	oliver@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	The "meta-port" for the XFce 4 desktop environment
+COMMENT=	The "meta-port" for the Xfce 4 desktop environment

 OPTIONS=	ICONS		"Install a full icon theme"		on  \
 		ORAGE		"Install the Xfce calendar application"	on  \
diff -ud xfce4.orig/pkg-descr xfce4/pkg-descr
--- xfce4.orig/pkg-descr	2011-09-14 20:40:48.000000000 +0900
+++ xfce4/pkg-descr	2011-09-15 18:27:45.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
-XFce is an easy-to-use and easy-to-configure environment for X11 released
+Xfce is an easy-to-use and easy-to-configure environment for X11 released
 under the terms of the GNU/GPL license, based on GTK+, with pulldown menus
 and color icons, 3D widgets, etc.

-XFce features now a set of applications including a powerful Window Manager
+Xfce features now a set of applications including a powerful Window Manager
 xfwm, a toolbar/application launcher, a backdrop manager, a system sound
 manager for X11, a user friendly  interface for mouse configuration, a
-pager providing a miniature view of all XFce desktops, a clock/calendar
+pager providing a miniature view of all Xfce desktops, a clock/calendar
 and at last but not least a filemanager, all sharing the same look'n feel.

 WWW: http://www.xfce.org/

----Next_Part(Thu_Sep_15_18_33_31_2011_097)----
